rag_rules: Fix 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by resolving root identifier references or deleting invalid clauses
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Delete AGREE clauses referencing AADL properties like Stack_Size that are not in expression scope
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions maintain type consistency and use only visible identifiers
Place component type contracts in type scopes and implementation bindings in implementation scopes
Validate that all helper functions and variables are declared before use
Avoid introducing new model dependencies in AGREE repairs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool; avoid AADL property names as variables
Component type annexes should reference only visible ports and type-level variables
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture or new identifiers when fixing AGREE diagnostics
Do not reference implementation subcomponents or ports in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE variables
Do not assume that unresolved references can be fixed by adding declarations
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about property associations
AGREE validator diagnostics about component type contracts
Model Analyst Agent's role in extracting AADL structure
Requirement Analyst's role in compact requirement semantics
